home.title: Your Notes
home.emptySubtitle:
Write down what she likes or dislikes
at each restaurant — we'll remind you!

capture.savedMsg: We'll remind you next time you're here!
capture.savedLocalMsg: Your note is saved on this device. Enable reminders to get notified when you revisit this place.
capture.remindersEnabledMsg: Charmly will remind you when you return to saved places.
capture.remindersUnavailableMsg: Your note is still saved locally. Charmly needs background location and notifications to send reminders.
capture.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take photos

map.nearbyEmpty: No nearby notes match your filters
map.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try another filter combination or reset to view all notes
map.emptyTitle: No notes on the map yet
map.emptySubtitle: Your saved notes will appear as pins here

noteDetail.deleteMsg: This note and its reminder will be permanently removed.
noteDetail.editingHint: Editing mode: update note and place

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearAllMsg: All your food notes will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.syncDetail: Upload your latest local notes to the signed-in Firebase account.
settings.syncSignInMsg: Connect your Google account before syncing notes to Firebase.
settings.syncUnavailableMsg: Firebase sync is not available in this build.
settings.syncFailedMsg: Unable to sync with Firebase right now. Please try again later.
settings.localModeDetail: This build is ready to use offline. Optional sync can be added later without changing your local notes.
settings.about: So you never forget what she likes 💛

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage the Google account connected to Charmly.
profile.name: Name
profile.syncHint: Use Settings to sync your local notes with Firebase.
profile.signedOutMsg: Sign in with Google to connect Firebase sync for this device.

auth.title: Charmly
auth.subtitle: So you never forget what she likes
auth.devModeMsg: Google sign-in in this build only stores your account on this device. Cloud sync can be connected later.
auth.localModeMsg: This build is using local-first mode. You can keep capturing notes without signing in.
auth.signInFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.

onboarding.subtitle1:
Write it down before you forget!
Charmly helps you remember her food preferences at every restaurant.
onboarding.subtitle2: Next time you arrive at that restaurant, you'll get a notification with your notes — no more "anh chả thương em" moments!
onboarding.subtitle3: Because remembering no onions in her phở is how you say "I love you".

notification.title: 💛 Hey, remember!
notification.body: You have a note here — open to see!
notification.photoBody: You took a photo here — open to see!

widget.idleText: Note it down before she gets upset 💛
